```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has the largest share of adults who identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, or transgender compared to any other highly populated state.",
    "About 2.7 million or roughly 9% of Californian adults identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, or transgender.",
    "There were over 391 reported hate crime events motivated by sexual orientation bias in California between 2021 to 2022, representing a 29% increase from the previous year.",
    "More than 200 pieces of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation were introduced in over 40 state legislatures in 2022.",
    "Up to 30% of youth living in foster care in California identify as LGBTQ.",
    "Roughly 13% of LGBTQ youth in foster care report being treated poorly, compared to around 6% of non-LGBTQ youth."
  ]
}
```
